flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Gavilan College rose 70% between 2021 and 2024 ($7.2k → $12.2k).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Gavilan College fell 42% between 2007 and 2010 (22.5% → 13.0%).

flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Gavilan College rose 29% between 2007 and 2010 ($3.5k → $4.5k).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Gavilan College fell 27% between 2009 and 2010 (4.8% → 3.5%).
